videos.title: Microsoft Surface Laptop ULTRA - Hands ON
videos.description:
Here's the NEW Microsoft Surface Laptop Ultra running the new NVIDIA RTX Spark ⚡️ 

18mm thick, 30% larger trackpad, 15" Mini LED Display and the most powerful laptop that Microsoft makes. Would you take this or a MacBook Pro?

videos.title: NVIDIA RTX Spark - First LOOK and Hands ON!
videos.description:
First look at the NEW NVIDIA RTX Spark Chip ⚡️

- This next gen chip features a Grace CPU and Blackwell GPU
- 1 Petaflop of AI Compute Performance
- 128GB of Unified Memory 

It's running here on the new ASUS Pro Art 16, one of the newest laptops to feature it and is considerably thinner than last year.

#NVIDIA #NVIDIAspark #tech #technology #Computex

videos.title: My Daily Tech EDC with NO iPhone or Apple Products
videos.description:
After many requests here is my Daily Tech EDC with no iPhone or Apple products. The OPPO Find X9 Ultra takes the best photos and video of any smartphone out currently as well! 

Thanks to Anker for sponsoring part of this episode. The Anker Liberty 5 Pro holds the Guinness World Record for call clarity in noisy environments.

videos.title: My DREAM Desk Setup for 2026!
videos.description:
Here's my first Desk Setup Tour in my new studio/home and the first setup build in 2026. Just like my previous setups, the build is very modern and minimal but still have some character with hints of orange. Hope this video helps some of you to create your own desk setup and let me know if there are any upgrade suggestions!
